title: phyllanthus caroliniensis subsp. saxicola
intro: Phyllanthus caroliniensis subsp. saxicola, commonly known as the saxicole phyllanthus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a type of shrub or small tree that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus caroliniensis subsp. saxicola include reducing inflammation and improving liver function, and it is often prepared as a tea or decoction for these purposes.
